title: Baked Sea Bass with Sweet Treat Crust
description: A delicious Italian-inspired dish featuring sea bass topped with a sweet and crunchy crust.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Rinse the sea bass fillets and pat them dry with paper towels.
Season the sea bass with salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
In a bowl, mix together the almond meal, brown sugar, and lemon zest.
Add the unsalted butter to the bowl and mix until crumbly.
Place the sea bass fillets on the prepared baking sheet.
Divide the crust mixture evenly among the sea bass fillets, pressing it gently onto the fish.
Drizzle the lemon juice over the crust.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until the fish is cooked through and the crust is golden brown.
